# Jailan Samun

> Full Stack Software Developer with 5+ years of experience building web and mobile applications, scalable APIs, and production-ready software.

## About

Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience building production web and mobile applications, scalable APIs, and responsive user experiences. Specializes in React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and modern backend systems, with a track record of delivering real products across startups and established companies.

Currently open to full-time and freelance opportunities in Full-Stack, Backend, Frontend, and Database roles.

## Skills

**Programming Languages:**
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Python
- PHP

**Frameworks & Libraries:**
- React
- Next.js
- Node.js
- Nest.js
- Express
- REST APIs
- GraphQL
- Framer Motion
- Redux

- Laravel

- PostgreSQL

- Prisma

- Firebase
- MySQL

**Cloud & Deployment:**
- Docker
- Azure
- Google Cloud
- Digital Ocean
- CI/CD
- GitHub Actions

**Tools & Other:**
- Git
- Tailwind
- MedusaJS
- Web Performance
- SEO (Technical & On-Page)

**Methodologies:**
- Agile / Scrum

**Languages:**
- English: C1 (business fluent)

## Experience

**blissio.ai** (2024 – 2026)
- Backend Developer → Team Lead
- Led the backend team and architected production APIs.
- Managed full application and API deployments for the entire platform across Azure, Google Cloud, and Digital Ocean using Docker.
- Deployed and maintained AI models on Azure and Google Cloud.
- Managed CI/CD pipelines and production deployment workflows.
- Later contributed to the React Native mobile frontend.

**AseelApp** (2023 – 2024)
- Progressed through three distinct roles within one year: started as Backend Developer building core APIs, transitioned to React Native mobile development on the Aseel Atalan app, then led frontend development on the main web platform.

**MCCO.af** (2023)
- Full-Stack Developer
- Built and launched the company website from the ground up using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MongoDB, and managed the complete application deployment.

**Open to Opportunities** (Present)
- Actively seeking full-time and freelance opportunities in Full-Stack, Backend, Frontend, and Database roles.
- Open to both remote and on-site positions worldwide.

## Projects

My most recent personal project is ResumeAF, a CV and resume builder. You can click on any project to view the live demo or explore the source code on GitHub. Please note that many of these projects are from earlier stages of my career, as the majority of my professional time has been spent building production applications for companies.

**ResumeAF** (2026)
- A CV and resume builder. Create your CV or resume, choose a template, and export it.
- Tech: PHP, Laravel, React, Next.js, Tailwind, MySQL
- https://resume.sleepany.com/
- https://github.com/iamjailan

**Sunzala Afghan Store** (2026)
- Afghan marketplace for authentic crafts, spices, clothing, and gemstones.
- Tech: Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, React Query, Tailwind CSS, E-commerce
- https://sunzala.vercel.app
- https://github.com/iamjailan/sunzala-store.git

**Marghai Job Portal** (2025)
- Full-stack job portal with secure authentication, job browsing, filtering, and real-time applications.
- Tech: Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Tailwind, React Query
- https://marghai.vercel.app/
- https://github.com/iamjailan/marghai-jobs-landing

**Wadan Real Estate** (2023 – 2024)
- Real estate web application built with the MERN stack.
- Tech: React, Express, MongoDB, Tailwind, Node.js
- https://wadan-estate.onrender.com/
- https://github.com/iamjailan/mern-estate-

**Chatak Weather** (2023)
- Multilingual weather application using OpenWeather API.
- Tech: React, JavaScript, OpenWeather API, Tailwind, React Router
- https://weather-af.netlify.app/
- https://github.com/iamjailan/weather

**Singar Store** (2023)
- E-commerce application built with React and Tailwind.
- Tech: React, React Router, Redux, Tailwind, Firebase
- https://singar.netlify.app/
- https://github.com/iamjailan/singar-store
